name: Sesame Noodles #3
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Chinese noodles; or 1/2 lb Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles until al dente.
2. Rinse in cold water, then drain well.
3. Toss with sesame oil.
4. In another bowl, mix sesame paste, chicken broth, sugar, salt, pepper, ginger, garlic, and vinegar using a wire whisk.
5. Add noodles (once cool) and bean sprouts to the above mixture and blend well.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if desired.
7. Place noodles in a glass bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for two hours.
8. Remove from refrigerator, divide onto small plates, top with cucumber and chives.
9. Makes four small servings. Enjoy!
